item.title: TheAthleticFC: The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 28s Since the start of last season, half of Atletico Madrid’s defeats at the Me
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 28s Since the start of last season, half of Atletico Madrid’s defeats at the Metropolitano have been against Hansi Flick’s Barcelona (3/6).
Lamine Yamal has given the visitors the perfect start tonight but it's a mess of Atleti's making.
They lead 1-0 inside five minutes in Madrid, Mostrar más 1 3 13 886
